---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new endpoint, data source, or enhancement for baseballr
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**

A clear and concise description of what the problem is.
Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**Which data source / function family?**

If your request relates to a specific data source, let us know which one:

- [ ] MLB Stats API (`mlb_*`)
- [ ] Baseball Savant / Statcast (`statcast_*`)
- [ ] FanGraphs (`fg_*`)
- [ ] Baseball Reference (`bref_*`)
- [ ] NCAA (`ncaa_*`)
- [ ] Retrosheet (`retrosheet_data`)
- [ ] Chadwick Bureau lookup (`chadwick_*`)
- [ ] Spotrac (`sptrc_*`)
- [ ] New data source not yet covered
- [ ] Other / general enhancement

**Describe the solution you'd like**

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. If you are
requesting a new endpoint, please link to the upstream page/API if possible.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features
you've considered.

**Additional context**

Add any other context, example data, or screenshots about the feature
request here.
